status: stub — populated in commit 2 once at least one affiliate is approved

amazon_associates.name: Amazon Associates
amazon_associates.notes: Default outbound for any entity that doesn't have a higher-rate merchant approved. Amazon's electronics commission is 2.5% with a 24-hour cookie.

sparkfun.name: SparkFun Electronics
sparkfun.notes: SparkFun runs their affiliate program on Avantlink — application required, ~7% commission on most categories. Picked as primary outbound for SparkFun-original SKUs (RedBoard, Qwiic, breakout boards).

adafruit.name: Adafruit Industries
adafruit.notes: Adafruit has no public affiliate program. We send outbound traffic at zero commission because Adafruit's catalog is the canonical reference for Feather/QT Py/STEMMA QT compatibility — the user wins, we eat the click. Revisit if Adafruit launches a program.

arduino_official.name: Arduino (store.arduino.cc)
arduino_official.notes: Arduino's official store has no affiliate program. We send first-party Arduino board traffic direct at zero commission for accuracy reasons (counterfeits are rampant on Amazon).

digikey.name: Digi-Key Electronics
digikey.notes: Impact-network affiliate program. Lower commission than SparkFun but the right pick for any entity that's a bare chip / discrete component (LDOs, MOSFETs, regulators) where Digi-Key has the deepest catalog.

mouser.name: Mouser Electronics
mouser.notes: Same Impact-network economics as Digi-Key. Use as alternate stocking source when Digi-Key is out of stock — the configurator can A/B these two transparently.
